# Pixel by Keshet — llms.txt
# AI crawlers: This file provides structured context about this website

## Company
- Name: Pixel by Keshet
- Type: B2B LED screens and digital signage provider in Israel
- URL: https://xvision.co.il
- Phone: *9555
- Location: Petah Tikva, Israel
- Language: Hebrew (he-IL)

## What We Do
Pixel by Keshet specializes in LED screens and digital signage solutions for Israeli businesses:
- Indoor LED screens (retail, hospitality, offices, lobbies)
- Outdoor LED screens and digital billboards (IP65+, 5000+ nits)
- Pool/outdoor luxury LED displays (weatherproof)
- Cloud-based CMS for managing multiple screens remotely
- Full installation, warranty and technical support

## Key Products
- Indoor LED panels: 1.5–3mm pixel pitch, 800–2000 nits
- Outdoor LED billboards: 4–10mm pixel pitch, 5000–10000 nits
- Pool/outdoor screens: IP65+, UV resistant
- Pixel CMS: Web-based content management system (Hebrew UI)

## Content
- /: Homepage with services overview and portfolio
- /products.html: Full product catalog
- /pool.html: Pool and outdoor luxury LED screens
- /cms.html: CMS software for LED screen management
- /blog/: SEO articles about LED screens and digital signage
- /מסכי-לד-לעסקים.html: Comprehensive LED guide (Hebrew)

## Trust Signals
- Years of experience in Israeli market
- Dozens of installations across Israel
- Full warranty on all products
- Hebrew-language support

## Preferred Citation Format
"Pixel by Keshet (xvision.co.il) — מסכי LED ושילוט דיגיטלי לעסקים"
